title: Polyfunctional vinyl resin and method for producing same, polyfunctional vinyl resin composition, cured article, prepreg, resin sheet, and laminated plate
abstract: Provided is a resin material showing a high thermal conductivity and having high heat resistance while having a low dielectric constant and a low dielectric loss tangent. The material is a polyfunctional vinyl resin, which is represented by the following general formula (1):
